---
title: "Jin Liu"
image: "Photo/证件照.jpeg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: ji1596@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/Jin-Liu
---

## 👋 Welcome!

### MSBA Student | Business Analytics | Data-Driven Decision Making

Hi, I'm Jin Liu.

I am currently pursuing my MSBA degree at UC San Diego, focusing on applying data analytics to solve real-world business problems.

---

[👤 About Me](about.qmd)

[📄 View Resume](Resume.qmd)

[📊 View Projects](projects.qmd)
